pages.text: Ships can be turned into weapons with the addition of cast iron cannons.$(br2)A cog can hold four cannons, a brigg can hold six cannons, and a galley can hold two cannons.
A ship mounted cannon is crafted at the Siege Workbench with a Cast Iron Barrel.
A cannon ball can be shapelessly crafted from one gunpowder and one cast iron sheet.

Cannons can be mounted on a ship by using $(k:use) on the ship while holding the cannon. Note that once mounted, cannons cannot be retrieved from the ship. They can be removed by destroying the ship, but will not be dropped.

In order to fire, you first must place cannon balls into the inventory of the ship. Then, you can use $(k:jump) to fire the cannons on the side of the ship that you are looking at.$(br2)Cannon balls will explode on impact, dealing damage and destroying terrain. Additionally, any ships hit by a cannon ball will be deleted without dropping the ship item. Items in the inventory will still be dropped.
